global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on travel offers.
global.main_message: Promoting special fares for travel bookings.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A light-colored circular shape positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A light-colored rectangular shape positioned in the center of the ad, overlapping with the circular shape.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Book your next trip Special fares today' positioned at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Special fares today

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The word 'WayPoint' in bold black text positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A bright yellow button with the text 'Shop now' positioned at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small text displaying '€9.99' in white, positioned at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the text 'SALE' positioned at the top right corner of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, travel offers, special fares
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main offer text is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Book your next trip Special fares today, WayPoint, Shop now, €9.99, SALE
